title: Vibration Isolation System
tagline: Isolating a platform from shake-table vibrations
lede: For this project, my group was tasked with creating a device that could isolate a platform from the vibrations of a shake table. We first developed several design concepts, then unanimously decided to build the device using wood and tension springs.

body: We used the formula for the natural frequency of an undamped spring-mass system, ωₙ = √(k/m), along with the goal of achieving a low natural frequency, to determine that we should use as large a mass as possible and relatively compliant springs to minimize the platform's natural frequency.
